description: Black Girl Vitamins | Sea Moss Gummies - Irish SeaMoss with Bladderwrack & Burdock - 60 Count
features: Packed with 92 Essential Minerals Black Bodies Crave – Made with Irish Sea Moss, Bladderwrack, and Burdock Root, these gummies give you the nutrients we’re often missing—like Iodine, Magnesium, Zinc, and Iron—to help you glow and thrive!

Supports Thyroid & Metabolic Health for Real Balance – Iodine and Zinc work together to keep your Thyroid effective and your metabolism moving, because your energy and hormones deserve that daily support.

Boosts Immunity and Keeps Your Energy Up – With Vitamins A, C, and B-complex in every bite, these gummies help your immune system stay strong while giving you that natural energy lift—no crash, no nonsense!

Helps With Digestion and Controlling Cravings – Loaded with Natural Fiber and Prebiotics, this blend supports gut health, helps beat the bloat, and keeps those snack cravings in check—especially around that time of the month.

Vegan, Halal & Free of Junk – No artificial flavors, no synthetic dyes, no dairy, and ZERO high fructose corn syrup. Just clean, plant-based nutrition that fits into your lifestyle—however you live it.
